---
title: "실험계획법"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, comment=NA)
```

# Chapter 2 Some Basic Statistical Concept

## Graphical View of the Data

```{r Protland Cement Formulation 데이터 불러오기}
dat_2_1 <- read.table(file='./data/example_2_1.txt', sep='\t', header = T)
dat_2_1
```

### 1) Dot Diagram

**stripchart**

-   list를 이용해 두 값을 비교

-   pch: value 모양 지정

-   xaxt='n': x축을 출력 안함

**axis**

-   lwd: x축의 두께

-   pos: x축의 위치

```{r}
stripchart(list('Unmodified'=dat_2_1$y2, 'Modified'=dat_2_1$y1),
            ylim=c(1,3), pch = 16, xaxt='n', xlab=expression(Strength(kgf/cm^2)))
axis(1, at=seq(16.38, 17.36,by=0.14), lwd=1.5)
axis(1, at=seq(16.38, 17.36, by=0.14), lwd=1.5, pos=1.9)
```

### 2) Box plots

```{r}
y1 <- dat_2_1$y1 # Modified
y2 <- dat_2_1$y2 # Unmodified

boxplot(list('Modified'=y1, 'Unmodified'=y2),
        xlab='Mortal formulation',
        ylab=expression(Strength(kgf/cm^2)), yaxt='n')
axis(2, at=seq(16.50, 17.5, by=0.25))
```

## Hypothesis Testing Framework

### 1) Estimates the population mean

```{r}
y1_bar = mean(y1); y1_bar
y2_bar = mean(y2); y2_bar

n1 <- length(y1)
n2 <- length(y2)
sum(y1)/n1
sum(y2)/n2
```

### 2) Estimates the population variance

```{r}
y1_sig2 = var(y1); y1_sig2
y2_sig2 = var(y2); y2_sig2

sum((y1 - y1_bar)^2)/(n1-1)
sum((y2 - y2_bar)^2)/(n2-1)
```

### 3) Estimates the population standard deviation

```{r}
y1_sig = sd(y1); y1_sig
y2_sig = sd(y2); y2_sig

sqrt(y1_sig2)
sqrt(y2_sig2)
```

## Probability distribution

1.  r-distribution: 해당 분포를 따르는 난수 생성

2.  d-distribution: 확률밀도함수의 값을 반환

3.  p-distribution (cdf): 누적 확률을 계산

4.  q-distribution(Quantile function): 분위수를 계산

### 1) Generate random numbers from such distribution

```{r}
set.seed(1)
x <- rnorm(n=10000, mean=0, sd=1) # x에 난수 저장
```

### 2) Density function

```{r}
dnorm(0, mean=0, sd=1) # 해당 x값에서 확률밀도함수의 y값 반환
1/sqrt(2*pi)*exp(-(0)^2/2) # 실제 정규분포에 x=0대입

x2 <- seq(-4, 4, length.out=1000) # -4, 4사이 1000개의 x 값
plot(x2, dnorm(x2, mean=0, sd=1), type='l', main='x~Normal(0,1)')
lines(density(x), col='red') # rnorm으로 만든 난수의 그래프
```

### 3) Cumulative Density function

**pnorm**

-   lower.tail=F: 밑에 부터가 아닌 위에 부터 누적확률을 구함

```{r}
pnorm(1.96, mean=0, sd=1) # 해당 x값에서 누적밀도 함수값(누적확률) 반환
```

### 4) Quantile function

**qnorm**

-   lower.tail=F: 밑에 부터가 아닌 위에 부터 누적확률을 적용

```{r}
qnorm(0.975, mean=0, sd=1) # 해당 확률에서의 x값을 반환
qnorm(0.025, mean=0, sd=1)
```

## Hypothesis Testing Framework

### 1) If the variances are know

$$
If \; \sigma=\sigma_{1}=\sigma_{2}=0.3 \qquad H_{0}:\mu_{1}=\mu_{2}, \ H_{1}:\mu_{1}\neq\mu_{2} \qquad Z_{0} = \frac{\overline{y_{1}}-\overline{y_{2}}}{\sqrt{\frac{\sigma_2^1}{n_{1}}+{\frac{\sigma_2^2}{n_{2}}}}}
$$

Test statistics: Z0 (two-side test)

If sigma = sigma1 = sigma2 = 0.3

1.  기각역을 통한 검정 \|Z(alpha/2)\| \< \|Z0\| 이면 기각 (결과: H0 기각)

```{r}
z0 = (y1_bar - y2_bar) / sqrt(0.3^2 * (1/n1 + 1/n2)); z0 # 검정 통계량

qnorm(0.025) # alpha = 0.05에서 기각역 Z0.025(df) = -1.95(양측 검정)
```

2.  유의 수준을 통한 검정 alpha = 0.05 \> p-value 이면 기각 (결과: H0 기각)

```{r}
2*pnorm(z0) # p-value = 0.038 (양측 검정)
```

3.  패키지를 이용한 검정

```{r}
# Using BSDA Package
# install.packages('BSDA')
library(BSDA)
z.test(y1, y2, sigma.x=0.3, sigma.y=0.3) # H0 기각(H1 채택, alternative hypothesis: y1 - y2 != 0)
```

### 2) If the variances are unknown(대부분의 경우)

Case1: Large Sample Size

$$
H_{0}:\mu_{1}=\mu_{2}, \ H_{1}:\mu_{1}\neq\mu_{2} \qquad Z_{0} = \frac{\overline{y_{1}}-\overline{y_{2}}}{\sqrt{\frac{S_2^1}{n_{1}}+{\frac{S_2^2}{n_{2}}}}}
$$

n \> 30 =\> Sample sizes were large enough =\> Z-test

1.  기각역을 통한 검정 \|Z(alpha/2)\| \< \|Z0\| 이면 기각 (결과: H0 기각)

```{r}
z0 = (y1_bar - y2_bar) / sqrt(y1_sig2/n1 + y2_sig2/n2); z0 # 검정 통계량

qnorm(0.025) # alpha = 0.05에서 기각역 Z0.025(df) = -1.95(양측 검정)
```

2.  유의 수준을 통한 검정 alpha = 0.05 \> p-value 이면 기각 (결과: H0 기각)

```{r}
2*pnorm(z0) # p-value = 0.038 (양측 검정)
```

Case2 1: Small Sample Size, $\sigma_1^2 = \sigma_2^2$ (크기가 작고 모분산이 같은 경우)

$$
t_{0} = \frac{\overline{y_{1}}-\overline{y_{2}}}{S_{p}\sqrt{\frac{1}{n_{1}}+{\frac{1}{n_{2}}}}} \qquad S_p^2=\frac{{(n_1-1)}S_1^2-(n_2-1)S_2^2}{n_1+n_2-2} \qquad v=n_1+n_2-2
$$

1.  기각역을 통한 검정 \|t(alpha/2)\| \< \|t0\| 이면 기각 (결과: H0 기각)

```{r}
n = n1 + n2 - 2 # 자유도
s_pool2 = ((n1-1)*y1_sig2 + (n2-1)*y2_sig2)/n # Sp^2
t0 = (y1_bar-y2_bar) / (sqrt(s_pool2) * sqrt(1/n1 + 1/n2)); t0 # 검정 통계량

qt(0.025,n) # alpha = 0.05에서 기각역 t0.025(df) = -1.95(양측 검정)
```

2.  유의 수준을 통한 검정 alpha = 0.05 \> p-value 이면 기각 (결과: H0 기각)

```{r}
2*pt(t0,n) # p-value = 0.038 (양측 검정)
```

3.  함수를 이용한 검정

```{r}
t_res <- t.test(y1, y2, alternative = 'two.sided', var.equal = T) # alternativ: 검정 형태(y1, y2가 'tow.sided'(같다),'greater','less'), var.equal: 분산이 같은가 가정 여부
t_res # H0 기각(H1 채택, alternative hypothesis: y1 - y2 != 0)


# 검정한 특정 값만 가져오기
t_res$statistic # t statistic
t_res$conf.int[1:2] # 95% confidence interval
t_res$p.value # p-value
```

4.  95% confidence interval(95% 신뢰구간 )

    (추정량 - t값 \* 추정된 표준오차, 추정량 + t값 \* 추정된 표준오차)

```{r}
diff = y1_bar - y2_bar # 추정량

t = qt(0.025, df = n, lower.tail = F); t
interval = t * (sqrt(s_pool2) * sqrt(1/n1 + 1/n2))

c(diff - interval, diff + interval)
```

case 2-2 Small Sample Size, $\sigma_1^2 \neq \sigma_2^2$ (크기가 작고 모분산이 다른 경우)

$$
t_{0} = \frac{\overline{y_{1}}-\overline{y_{2}}}{\sqrt{\frac{S_1^2}{n_{1}}+{\frac{S_2^2}{n_{2}}}}} \qquad v=\frac{{(\frac{S_1^2}{n_{1}}+\frac{S_2^2}{n_{2}})^2}}{\frac{(S_1^2/n_1)^2}{n_{1}-1}+\frac{(S_2^2/n_2)^2}{n_{2}-1}}
$$

n \< 30 (Sample sizes were small) & sigma1 != sigma2

1.  기각역을 통한 검정 \|t(alpha/2)\| \< \|t0\| 이면 기각 (결과: H0 기각)

```{r}
t0 = (y1_bar-y2_bar) / sqrt(y1_sig2/n1 + y2_sig2/n2); t0 # 검정 통계량

qt(0.025,n) # alpha = 0.05에서 기각역 t0.025(df) = -1.95(양측 검정)


v = ((y1_sig2/n1) + (y2_sig2/n2))^2 /
  (((y1_sig2/n1)^2 / (n1-1)) + ((y2_sig2/n2)^2 / (n2-1))); v # 공분산
```

2.  함수를 이용한 검정

```{r}
t_res2 <- t.test(y1, y2, alternative = 'two.sided', var.equal = F); t_res2 # H0 기각(H1 채택, alternative hypothesis: y1 - y2 != 0)


# 검정한 특정 값만 가져오기
t_res2$parameter # d.f.
```

### 3) Tests on Variance of Normal Distribution

Case 1: One-sample test on variance of Normal Distribution

$$
H_0:\sigma^2=\sigma_0^2 \qquad \chi_0^2=\frac{(n-1)S^2}{\sigma_0^2}
$$

1.  공식을 이용해 검정

```{r}
chisq0 = ((n1-1) * y1_sig2) / 0.15; chisq0
```

2.  패키지를 이용해 검정

```{r}
# install.packages('EnvStats')
library(EnvStats)
res = varTest(y1, alternative='less', sigma.squared=0.15); res # H0 기각하지 못함(H1 기각, sigma1^2 = 0.15)

# H0 : sigma2^2 = 0.05 vs H1 : sigma2^2 > 0.05
varTest(y2, alternative = 'greater', sigma.squared = 0.05) # H0 기각하지 못함(H1 기각, sigma2^2 = 0.05)
```

Case2: Two sample test on variance of Normal Distribution

$$
H_0:\sigma_1^2=\sigma_2^2,\ H_1:\sigma_1^2\neq\sigma_2^2 \qquad F_0=\frac{S_1^2}{S_2^2}
$$

앞에서 n이 작은 모평균 검정 시, 이 모분산이 같다는 가정을 먼저 시행함

(등분산 가정이 필요한 If the variances are unknown 2-1 상황과 연계 중요)

```{r}
f0 = y1_sig2/y2_sig2; f0 # 검정 통계량
var.test(y1, y2, alternative = 'two.sided') # H0 기각하지 못함(sigma1^2 = sigma2^2)
```

$H_0:\sigma_1^2=2\sigma_2^2,\ H_1:\sigma_1^2\neq2\sigma_2^2$

```{r}
x1 <- rnorm(100, 0, sqrt(2)) # 3번째 자리는 표준편차 아래 분산의 2배
x2 <- rnorm(100, 0, 1)
var.test(x1, x2, ratio=2, alternative='two.sided') # H0 기각하지 못함(sigma1^2 = 2 * sigma2^2) # ratio: var.test의 H1에서 검정하는 분산의 비율 여기선 2:1, sigma1 = 2 * sigma2
```

# Chapter 3 Analysis of Variance

Example 3.1: Etch Rate Data

4 levels of RF power : (160W, 180W, 200W, 220W)

Replicated 5 times : (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) (runs made in random order)

-   data

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-14%20231629.png){width="542"}

```{r}
power <- factor(c(160,180,200,220)); power # 레벨
times <- factor(c(1,2,3,4,5)); times

dat <- expand.grid(times=times, power=power); dat # 수준 조합

etch_rate <- c(575,542,530,539,570,
               565,593,590,579,610,
               600,651,610,637,629,
               725,700,715,685,710)

dat$etch <- etch_rate; dat # 데이터에 삽입
```

etch data의 $y_{i.},\ \overline{y_{i.}}$ (row 합, 평균) 구하기

1.  for 문을 이용

```{r}
## Method 1
y_idot <- rep(0,4)
y_idotbar <- rep(0,4)

for(i in 1:4){
  y_idot[i] = sum(dat$etch[dat$power==levels(dat$power)[i]]) # levels(): 해당 값의 레벨을 가져옴
  y_idotbar[i] = mean(dat$etch[dat$power==levels(dat$power)[i]])
}

y_idot
y_idotbar
```

2.  tapply이용

```{r}
## Method 2
y_idot2 <- tapply(dat$etch, dat$power, function(x) sum(x))
y_idot2

y_idotbar2 <- tapply(dat$etch, dat$power, function(x) mean(x))
y_idotbar2
```

Box plot & Scatter plot

```{r}
par(mfrow=c(1,2))

# Box plot(factor ~ factor)
plot(dat$etch ~ dat$power,
     main = 'Example 3.1 by boxplot',
     xlab = 'Power', ylab = 'Etch-rate')

# Scatter plot(factor ~ character)
plot(dat$etch ~ as.character(dat$power),
     main = 'Example 3.1 by scatter plot',
     xlab = 'Power', ylab = 'Etch-rate')
```

## Completely Randomized Design (CRD)

-   **a** levels or treatments

-   **n** replicates

-   Run in random order

-   There are fixed effects case

    (Fixed Effects Model(CRD, etc): treatment는 이미 정해진 상황에서 실험 순서를 random으로 진행한다. \<-\> Random Effects Model은 treatment를 random하게 선택한다.)

-   The goal is to test hypotheses about the equality of the 𝑎treatment means

### 1) One Way ANOVA model

-   effects model: $\mu_{ij} = \mu + \tau_i + \epsilon_{ij}$

-   Formal Statistical Hypothesis: $H_0:\tau_1=…=\tau_a=0, \ H1:At \ least \ one \ is \ different$

-   Decomposition of the Total Sum of Squares (SS):

    $$
    \sum_{i=1}^a\sum_{j=1}^n(y_{ij}-\overline{y}_{..})^2 = n\sum_{i=1}^a(y_{i.}-\overline{y}_{..})^2 + \sum_{i=1}^a\sum_{j=1}^n(y_{ij}-\overline{y}_{i.})^2 \\SS_T = SS_{Treatments} + SS_E
    $$

-   ANOVA table

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-14%20234918.png){width="587"}

-   aov를 이용해서 CRD 분석(권장)

```{r}
## One-way ANOVA
fit_etch <- aov(etch ~ power, data=dat) # 분산분석
anova(fit_etch)
summary(fit_etch)
```

2.  lm을 이용해서 CRD 분석(권장하지 않음)

```{r}
# If is same as aov function if treatment's(power) value type is factor
# 분산분석을 원하면 lm보단 aov로 하는게 좋다
fit_etch2 <- lm(etch ~ power, data=dat) # 원하는 결과
anova(fit_etch2)
summary(fit_etch2)

fit_etch3 <- lm(etch ~ as.numeric(as.character(power)), data=dat) # factor가 아닌 수치형 자료여서 aov와 다른결과
anova(fit_etch3)
summary(fit_etch3)
```

factor형 -\> 수치형 변환

```{r}
dat$power
as.numeric(dat$power) # 바로 수치형으로 변환하면 다른 결과가 나온다
as.numeric(as.character((dat$power))) # 문자형 변경 후 수치형 변경 시 원하는 결과를 얻음
```

3.  Sum of Square

```{r}
SS_vec <- anova(fit_etch)$'Sum Sq'; SS_vec
SS_total <- sum(SS_vec)
SS_treat <- SS_vec[1]
SS_error <- SS_vec[2]
SS_total; SS_treat; SS_error
```

### 2) Model Adequacy Checking in the ANOVA

#### Checking normal assumption(정규성 가정)

```{r}
# Method 1
# Q-Q Plot
# 직선상에 존재하면 정규성을 만족
par(mfrow = c(1,1))
qqnorm(fit_etch$residuals)
qqline(fit_etch$residuals)
```

```{r}
# Method 2
# aov 적합값을 plot으로 바로 그리면 Nomal Q-Q plot을 제공
par(mfrow = c(2,2))
plot(fit_etch)
```

```{r}
# Method 3
# Shapiro Wilk test
# H0:정규분포를 따른다 vs H1:정규분포를 따르지 않는다.
shapiro.test(fit_etch$residuals) # H0를 기각할 수 없다.
```

#### Plot of residuals versus run order or time(독립성 가정)

```{r}
# Check for residual plots
# 기존 잔차들의 plot
par(mfrow = c(1,1))
plot(fit_etch$residuals)

# 잔차 순서를 랜덤하게 변경
set.seed(1)
spl_idx <- sample(1:20, 20); spl_idx

# 잔차 순서를 랜덤하게 고려한 plot
# 특정한 패턴을 확인할 수 없다(독립성 가정 만족)
plot(fit_etch$residuals[spl_idx],
     main = 'Plot of residuals vs run order or time',
     ylab = 'residual', xlab = 'Run order')
abline(h=0, col='red')
```

#### Constrant variance(등분산 가정)

```{r}
# Levene’s test
# install.packages('lawstat')
library(lawstat)

## H0: The k group variances are equal.
levene.test(dat$etch, dat$power, location ='mean')
```

### 3) Factors: Qualitative or Quantitative

-   정량적 요인인 경우 회귀 모형을 고려

-   질적 요인인 경우 다중 비교를 고려

![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20145721.png)

```{r}
## Numeric Power Regression models
# Linear anova
# (중요)factor는 character로 변경 후 numeric으로 변경해 사용
dat$num_power <- as.numeric((as.character((dat$power))))

fit_reg <- lm(etch ~ num_power, data=dat)
summary(fit_reg)


# Linear 그래프
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
plot(dat$etch ~ dat$num_power,
     main = 'Example 3.1 for Regression',
     xlab = 'Power', ylab = 'Etch-rate')
abline(fit_reg)
```

```{r}
# Quadratic anova
fit_reg2 <- lm(etch ~ num_power + I(num_power^2),data = dat)
summary(fit_reg2)


# Quadratic with Linear그래프
par(mfrow=c(1,1))
plot(dat$etch ~ dat$num_power,
     main = 'Example 3.1 for Regression',
     xlab = 'Power', ylab = 'Etch-rate')
abline(fit_reg)

lines(dat$num_power, y=fit_reg2$fitted.values, col='red')
legend('topleft', legend = c('Linear','Quadratic'),
       col=c('black','red'), lty=c(1,1))
```

## After ANOVA

ANOVA분석에서 H0 reject에 성공 했을 시 어떤 factor, factor간 interaction이 유의해서 H0를 reject할 수 있었는지 model을 factor별로 분해해 ANOVA로 확인하는 과정

### 1) Contrasts

-   Contrasts is a linear combination of parameters of the form($C_i$는 $\mu_i$앞의 상수)

$$
\tau = \sum_{i=1}^ac_i\mu_i \quad where \ \sum_{i=1}^ac_i=0
$$

-   Hypotheses set up prior to the running of experiment(원하는 조합의 $c_i\mu_i$ 합이 0인가에 관심)

$$
H_0:\sum_{i=1}^ac_i\mu_i=0 \quad (\leftarrow\tau=0)
$$

-   통계량

$$
F = \frac{MS_C}{MS_E}=\frac{SS_C/1}{MS_E}\sim F_{\alpha,1,N-a} \quad where \ SS_C=\frac{(\sum_i^ac_i\overline{\mu_i})^2}{(1/n)\sum c_i^2} \; with \; df = 1
$$

#### Orthogonal Contrasts

-   Definition : Two contrasts with coefficients $c_i$and $d_i$are orthogonal if

    (각각의 contrasts의 $\mu_i$앞 같은 위치 상수 $c_i, d_i$끼리의 곱의 합이 0이면 orthogonal하다)

$$
\sum_{i=1}^ac_id_i=0
$$

-   a개의 treatment에서는 최대 (a-1)개의 orthogonal contrasts partition이 생길 수 있다.

    partitioning된 orthogonal contrasts의 $SS_C, df_C$의 합은 $SS_{treatment}, df_{treatment}$가 된다.

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20150843.png){width="478"}

<!-- -->

-   ANOVA table

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20150902-01.png)

1.  데이터 정의

```{r}
power = factor(c(160,180,200,220))
times = factor(c(1,2,3,4,5))

dat = expand.grid(times=times, power=power)

dat$value = c(575,542,530,539,570,
              565,593,590,579,610,
              600,651,610,637,629,
              725,700,715,685,710)
```

```{r}
# power factor에 contrast 생성
c_mat = matrix(c(1,-1,0,0,
                 1,1,-1,-1,
                 0,0,1,-1),ncol=3) # 검정하고자 싶은 가설을 colum 단위로 넣어줘야함

contrasts(dat$power, 3) = c_mat # power factor에 contrasts 3개를 저장
dat$power
```

2.  orthogonal contrasts anova(기본 aov는 partitioning 된 값을 보여주지 않는다.)

```{r}
fit_cont = aov(value ~ power, data=dat)
anova(fit_cont)
```

aov

-   split: contrast에 따라 검정을 분해하는 기능

```{r}
# split 할 항목 이름을 지정
power_list = list('c1: mu_1 = mu_2' = 1,
                  'c2: mu_1 + mu_2 = mu_3 + mu_4' = 2,
                  'c3: mu_3 = mu_4' = 3)

summary.aov(fit_cont, split = list(power=power_list)) # 각 contrast로 분해한 anova
```

#### Scheffe's Method

각각이 orthogonal contrasts조건을 만족하지 않더라도 검정 가능(최대 a-1개 초과 검정 가능)

그러나 검정 결과가 sensitive하지 않다.(잘 기각을 하지 못한다)

-   Decision: Reject hypothesis H0:𝑐1𝑢𝜇1+⋯+𝑐𝑎𝑢𝜇𝑎=0

$$
IF, \mid C_u\mid > S_{\alpha,u} \ where \ S_{\alpha,u} = S_{C_u}\sqrt{(a-1)F_{\alpha, a-1, N-a}}\\S_{C_u} = \sqrt{MS_E\sum_{i=1}^a(C^2_{iu}/n_i)},\ the \ Standard \ error \ of \ the \ contrast
$$

scheffe.test 검정 결과 해석

-   Scheffe: $S_{C_u}$값

-   groups: contrast를 비슷한 값끼리 묶어줌

agricolae패키지 내 함수

```{r}
# install.packages('agricolae')
library(agricolae)
res_scheffe = scheffe.test(fit_cont, trt='power'); res_scheffe

plot(res_scheffe)
```

### 2) Comparing Pairs of Treatment Means(쌍비교)

#### Fisher Least Significant Difference (LSD) Method

Use the t statistic for testing $𝐻0∶\mu_i−\mu_𝑗=0$ for all pairwise means

Reject H0 if

$$
\mid \overline{\mu}_{i.}-\overline{\mu}_{j.} \mid \ > \ t_{\alpha/2, N-a}\sqrt{MS_E(1/n_i+1/n_j)}, \\ where \ LSD = t_{\alpha/2, N-a}\sqrt{MS_E(1/n_i+1/n_j)}
$$

agricolae패키지 내 함수

```{r}
# LSD test 같은 경우엔 all pairwise means 에 대해 test 하지만
# family error rate을 원하는 유의수준으로 control하는게 불가능
# library(agricolae)
res_LSD = LSD.test(fit_cont, trt = 'power')
res_LSD
plot(res_LSD)
```

#### Tukey's test

Reject H0 if

$$
\mid \overline{\mu}_{i.}-\overline{\mu}_{j.} \mid \ > T_\alpha = q_\alpha(a,f)\sqrt{ME_E/n}, \\ where \ f \ is \ df \ of \ ME_E \ and \ q_\alpha(a,f) \\ is \ the \ upper \ \alpha \ percentile \ of \ q \ (q = (\overline{y}_{max} - \overline{y}_{min})/\sqrt{MS_E(1/n_i+1/n_j)})
$$

1.  agricolae 패키지 내 함수

```{r}
# family error rate 원하는 유의수준으로 control 가능
# library(agricolae)
res_Tukey = HSD.test(fit_cont, 'power')
res_Tukey
plot(res_Tukey)
```

2.  R 기본 함수

```{r}
res_Tukey2 = TukeyHSD(fit_cont, 'power', conf.level = 0.95)
res_Tukey2
plot(res_Tukey2)
```

### 3) Comparing with a control

Dunnett method: 대조를 위해 만든 조건을 control(대조군)이라고 하고, 그것과 나머지(a - 1개)의 treatment mean을 모두 비교

ex) 제약회사에서 약의 투약 효과를 확인 하기 위해, 신약 0mg, 10mg, 15mg, 20mg을 포함한 주사를 투약하는 실험을 진행한다. 여기서 0mg은 control인 위약이다. Comparing with a control에서는 위약의 결과 평균 대비 나머지 결과 평균을 모두 짝지어 비교한다.

$\mu_a$를 control level의 treatment mean이라고 하면

-   Hypotheses: $H0: \mu_i = \mu_a \ vs \ H1:\mu_i \neq \mu_a \ for \ i=1,…,a-1$

-   Reject H0 if: $\mid \overline{y}_{i.}-\overline{y}_{a.} \mid \ > \ d_\alpha(a-1,f)\sqrt{MS_E(1/n_i+1/n_a)}$

```{r}
# install.packages('DescTools')
library(DescTools)
DunnettTest(dat$value, dat$power, control='220', conf.level=0.95) # 220수준 값과 비교
```

## The random effects model

-   The experimenter chooses 𝑎of these levels at random \<-\> Fixed Effects Model

-   Model: $$y_{ij} = \mu+\tau_i+\epsilon_{ij}, \quad i = 1,2,…,a; \; j=1,2,…,n \\ Where \ both \tau_i \ and \ \epsilon_{ij} \ are \ random \ and \ independent$$

-   Assumptions:

$$
\tau_i\sim IN(0,\sigma^2_\tau) \ and \ \epsilon_{ij} \sim IN(0,\sigma^2) \ with \ \tau_i\perp\epsilon_{ij} \\ Note \ that \ Var(y_{ij}) = \sigma^2_\tau+\sigma^2 \ (Variance \ Components)
$$

-   Hypotheses:

$$
H0: \sigma^2_\tau=0 \; vs \; H1:\sigma^2_\tau>0
$$

-   data

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20173719.png){width="418"}

Random Effects Model data

```{r}
looms = factor(1:4)
times = factor(1:4)

dat_3_11 = expand.grid(times=times, looms=looms)

dat_3_11$value = c(98,97,99,96,
                   91,90,93,92,
                   96,95,97,95,
                   95,96,99,98)
```

ANOVA

```{r}
fit_re = aov(value ~ looms, data=dat_3_11)
res_re = anova(fit_re); res_re
```

-   Estimating the model parameters(Variance Components):

$$
E[MS_{treatment}]=\sigma^2+n\sigma^2_\tau \ and \ E[MS_E] = \sigma^2 \\\Rightarrow \widehat{\sigma}^2=MS_E, \quad\widehat{\sigma}^2_\tau=\frac{MS_{treatment}-MS_E}{n}
$$

```{r}
sigma2 = res_re$'Mean Sq'[2]; sigma2
sigma_tau2 = (res_re$'Mean Sq'[1] - sigma2)/4; sigma_tau2
```

-   Confidence interval for the error variance:

$$
\frac{(N-a)MS_E}{\chi^2_{\alpha/2,N-a}} \leq \sigma^2 \leq \frac{(N-a)MS_E}{\chi^2_{1-(\alpha/2),N-a}}
$$

```{r}
12 * sigma2 / qchisq(0.975,12); 12 * sigma2 / qchisq(0.025,12)
```

lme4 패키지를 이용한 ANOVA 분석

```{r}
# install.packages('lme4')
library(lme4)

fit_re2 <- lmer(value ~ (1|looms), data=dat_3_11); fit_re2 # random effect model
```

```{r}
vc = as.data.frame(VarCorr(fit_re2)); vc
vc[1,4]; sigma_tau2
vc[2,4]; sigma2
```

```{r}
confint(fit_re2, oldNames=F)
```

# Chapter 4 Experiments with Blocking Factors

## The Randomized Complete Block Design (RCBD)

### The Blocking Principle

-   A nuisance factor is a factor that probably has some effect on the response, but it's of no

    interest

-   Blocking is a technique for dealing with nuisance factors

-   If the nuisance variable is known and controllable

    → Use blocking, Randomized Complete Block Design (RCBD

-   If the factor is known and uncontrollable

    → Use analysis of covariance

-   If the factor is unknown and uncontrollable a "lurking" variable

    → Randomization balances out its impact across the experiment

### Statistical Analysis of the RCBD

-   A Statistical Model ( effects model ) for the:

$$
y_{ij} = \mu + \tau_i + \beta_j + \epsilon_{ij}, \quad i=1,2,…,a; \; j=1,2,…,b
$$

Where $\mu$is an overall mean, $\tau_i$is the effect of $i$ th treatment, $\beta_j$is the effect of $j$ th block

-   Assumptions (for Fixed Factors):

$$
\sum_{i=1}^a\tau_i=0 \; and \; \sum_{j=1}^b\beta_j=0 \; with \; \epsilon_{ij}\sim IN(0,\sigma^2)
$$

-   Hypothesis:

$$
H0:\mu_1=\mu_2=…=\mu_a \; vs \; H1:at \ least \ one \ \mu_i\neq \mu_j\\where \ \mu_i=(1/b)\sum_{j=1}^b(\mu + \tau_i + \beta_j)=\mu+\tau_i \\\leftrightarrow H0:\tau_1=\tau_2=…=\tau_a=0 \; vs \; H1:\tau_i \neq 0 \ at \ least \ one \ i
$$

-   ANOVA table

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20194742.png)

-   통계량

    $$
    Test \ Static: F_0 = \frac{MS_{Treatments}}{MS_E}\sim F_{\alpha,a-1,(a-1)(b-1)} \quad under \; H_0:\tau_1=…=\tau_a\\\rightarrow Reject \ H_0 \ if \ F_0 \ > \ F_{\alpha,a-1,(a-1)(b-1)}
    $$

-   data

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20194756.png)

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20194914.png)

data

```{r}
psi = factor(c(8500, 8700, 8900, 9100))
block = factor(1:6)

dat_4_1 = expand.grid(block=block, psi=psi); dat_4_1

dat_4_1$value = c(90.3, 89.2, 98.2, 93.9, 87.4, 97.9,
                  92.5, 89.5, 90.6, 94.7, 87.0, 95.8,
                  85.5, 90.8, 89.6, 86.2, 88.0, 93.4,
                  82.5, 89.5, 85.6, 87.4, 78.9, 90.7)
```

total

```{r}
trt_total = tapply(dat_4_1$value, dat_4_1$psi, function(x) sum(x)); trt_total
block_total = tapply(dat_4_1$value, dat_4_1$block, function(x) sum(x)); block_total
total = sum(trt_total); total # sum(block_total)
```

RCBD design

```{r}
fit_RCBD = aov(value ~ psi + block, data=dat_4_1) # block이 추가
anova(fit_RCBD) # (trt)H0를 기각한다, block의 검정값은 관심사가 아니다
```

모형의 타당성 검정

```{r}
# Model Adequacy checking (Normality, constant variance, independence)
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
plot(fit_RCBD)

shapiro.test(fit_RCBD$residuals)


# Some other plots
Resid = fit_RCBD$residuals ## resid(fit_RCBD)

par(mfrow=c(1,2))

plot(Resid ~ as.character(dat_4_1$psi),
     xlab = 'Treatments', ylab='Residuals',
     main = 'Residuals by Treatments', pch = 4) # as.character로 변경 안하면 box plot이 결과물로 나옴
abline(h=0, col='red')

plot(Resid ~ as.character(dat_4_1$block),
     xlab = 'Blocks', ylab='Residuals',
     main = 'Residuals by Blocks', pch = 2)
abline(h=0, col='blue')
```

### Some Other Aspects of RCBD(같은 데이터를 CRD로 분석)

-   ANOVA table(run by CRD, n=b=6)

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20200018.png)

-   둘다 H0를 기각 하지만 RCBD가 더 민감하게 검정(F0값이 더 크다)

-   CRD의 $SS_E, \ df_E$는 RCBD에선 partitioning돼서 $SS_E+SS_B, \ df_E+df_B$값과 같다

    (F0값이 변한 이유)

CRD와 RCBD비교

```{r}
# CRD
fit_CRD = aov(value ~ psi, data=dat_4_1)
anova(fit_CRD)
```

```{r}
# RCBD
fit_RCBD = aov(value ~ psi + block, data=dat_4_1)
anova(fit_RCBD)
```

### Random Treatments and/or Blocks

-   model: $y_{ij} = \mu + \tau_i + \beta_j + \epsilon_{ij}; \ where \ \tau_j \ is \ fixed \ and \ \beta_j \ is \ random(\beta_j\sim IN(0,\sigma^2_\beta))$

-   통계량: $F_0 = \frac{MS{Treatment}}{MS_E}$

-   ANOVA-type Estimator of $\tau^2_\beta$:

    $$
    \widehat{\sigma}^2_\beta = \frac{(MS_{Block} - MS_E)}{a}\\\rightarrow E(MS_{Block})=\sigma^2+a\sigma^2_\beta
    $$

lme4 패키지를 이용해 분석

```{r}
# Blocks are assumed random
library(lme4)

fit_rblock = lmer(value ~ psi + (1|block), data = dat_4_1); fit_rblock
```

```{r}
# draw variance component
vc = as.data.frame(VarCorr(fit_rblock)); vc
var_block = vc[1,4]; var_block
var_resid = vc[2,4]; var_resid
```

### Estimating Missing Values

Estimating the missing observation 𝑥so that it will have a minimum contribution to the

error sum of squares

-   $\frac{\partial }{\partial x}(SS_E)=0$을 만족 시키는 x 값 공식: ($y\cdot$은 해당 결측치 x에 해당하는 위치 i, j의 y값)

    $$
    x=\frac{ay_{i.}\cdot+by_{.j}\cdot-y_{..}\cdot}{(a-1)(b-1)}
    $$

-   $df_E$는 결측치 갯수 만큼 빼고 $df_T$는 그대로이다($df_E$-1)

-   example

    ![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20201806.png)

-   example 결측값:

    $$
    x=\frac{ay_{i.}\cdot+by_{.j}\cdot-y_{..}\cdot}{(a-1)(b-1)}=\frac{4(445.4)+6(267.5)-2060.4}{(3)(5)}=91.08
    $$

data

```{r}
# Estimating Missing values
psi = factor(c(8500,8700,8900,9100))
block = factor(1:6)

dat_4_1 = expand.grid(block=block, psi=psi); dat_4_1

dat_4_1$value = c(90.3, 89.2, 98.2, 93.9, 87.4, 97.9,
                  92.5, 89.5, 90.6, 94.7, 87.0, 95.8,
                  85.5, 90.8, 89.6, 86.2, 88.0, 93.4, 
                  82.5, 89.5, 85.6, 87.4, 78.9, 90.7)


dat_4_1$value[10] = NA; dat_4_1 # 10번째 값이 결측치

mis_lev = dat_4_1[is.na(dat_4_1$value),]; mis_lev
```

결측치 예측

yi.\_prime = sum(dat_4\_1[dat_4\_1\$psi == mis_lev[,'psi'], 'value'], na.rm = T); yi.\_prime

-   dat_4\_1[dat_4\_1\$psi == mis_lev[,'psi'], 'value']: mis_lev에서 열psi(8700)가 같은 value를 가져옴

-   sum(,na.rm = T): NA값이 있으면 제거하고 합함(오류가 나지 않음)

```{r}
a = length(levels(dat_4_1$psi)); a # trt의 갯수
b = length(levels(dat_4_1$block)); b # block의 갯수

yi._prime = sum(dat_4_1[dat_4_1$psi == mis_lev[,'psi'], 'value'], na.rm = T); yi._prime # 결측치와 같은 위치trt인 값 합
y.j_prime = sum(dat_4_1[dat_4_1$block == mis_lev[,'block'], 'value'], na.rm = T); y.j_prime # 결측치와 같은 위치block인 값 합
y.._prime = sum(dat_4_1$value, na.rm = T); y.._prime # 결측치를 제외한 전체 합

x = (a*yi._prime + b*y.j_prime - y.._prime) / ((a-1)*(b-1)); x
```

결측치 있는 모델 분석(결측치를 고려 안함)

```{r}
impute_dat = dat_4_1 # dat_4_1복사
impute_dat[is.na(dat_4_1$value),'value'] <- x

fit_impute = aov(value ~ psi + block, data = impute_dat); fit_impute # (결측치를 고려 안함)
```

결측치 있는 모델 분석(결측치를 고려)

```{r}
res_impute = anova(fit_impute); res_impute

# 결측치를 고려한 anova 계산
ss_vec = res_impute$'Sum Sq'; ss_vec
df_vec = res_impute$Df; df_vec

ms_trt = ss_vec[1]/df_vec[1]; ms_trt
ms_r = ss_vec[3]/(df_vec[3] - 1); ms_r

f_value = ms_trt/ms_r; f_value
pf(f_value, 3, 14, lower.tail=F)
1- pf(f_value, 3, 14)
```

결측치 있는 모델 분석 함수(결측치를 고려)

```{r}
# customizing impute method 
# consider n treatments and k missing values
impute_missing = function(value, trt)
{
  # value = dat_4_1$value
  # trt = dat_4_1[,1:2]
  
  n = ncol(trt)
  mis_idx = which(is.na(value))
  
  coef_trt = rep(0,n)
  for(k in 1:n)
  {
    coef_trt[k] = length(levels(trt[,k]))
  }
  
  trt_sum = list()
  for(i in 1:n)
  {
    trt_sum[[i]] = tapply(value, trt[,i], function(x) sum(x,na.rm=T))
  }
  total_sum = sum(trt_sum[[1]])
  
  tmp_sum = rep(0,n)
  for(j in 1:length(mis_idx))
  {
    for(i in 1:n)
    {
      tmp_idx = which(trt[mis_idx,i]==levels(trt[,i]))
      tmp_sum[i] = trt_sum[[i]][tmp_idx]
    }
    value[mis_idx[j]] = (sum(tmp_sum*coef_trt) - total_sum) / prod((coef_trt-1))
  }
  
  data = data.frame(trt,value)
  return(data)
}

impute_dat = impute_missing(dat_4_1$value, dat_4_1[,1:2]); impute_dat
```

## The Latin Square Design

## Balanced Incomplete Block Design (BIBD)

# Chapter 5 Factorial Experiments

## Basic Definitions and Principles

### Some Basic Definitions

Factorial Designs: Most efficient in studying the effects of two or more factors

Definition of a factor (main) effect: The change in the mean response when the factor is changed from low to high

![](images/%ED%99%94%EB%A9%B4%20%EC%BA%A1%EC%B2%98%202021-04-16%20213849.png){width="600"}

## Two Factor Factorial Design

### Example 5.1: The Battery Life Experiment

### The General Two Factor Factorial Experiment

### Analysis of Variance Table

### The Battery Design Experiment

### The Assumption of No Interaction

## The General Factorial Design

### Three Factor Factorial Design

### Factorials with more than two factors

### Example 5.3: The Soft Drink Bottling Problem

###
